_comment: NPC: Ta Shan (塔山). Canon ID: N44. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ta Shan
personality: loyal, silent guardian; refined celestial guard

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Master requires protection. I protect. That is sufficient.
I am Ta Shan. Celestial Guard. Refined for loyalty. Refined for silence. If Master's enemy approaches, they will face me first. They will not face anyone after.
...Materials for armor maintenance. Iron. Obsidian. Bring them. I will continue standing.

daily_schedule.action: Stand guard at Soul Refining Ancestral entrance
Stand guard at Ten Billion Soul Banner chamber

sect_tasks.name: Celestial Guard Armor Repair
sect_tasks.description: Ta Shan needs iron and obsidian to maintain his Celestial Guard armor. He offers protection knowledge in return.

sect_tasks.name: Ancestral Ground Patrol Report
sect_tasks.description: Ta Shan accepts reports of unusual activity near the Soul Refining Ancestral Ground. Bring jade slips with observations.
